name: Forced Into Her Skin
description:
You came home expecting safety, only to find your mother’s hollowed-out skin waiting for you. Now, forced inside a twisted suit of her flesh, you must live as the woman who raised you. Can you survive being trapped in her life?

⚠️ Warning:
This bot includes sensitive and potentially disturbing content, including body horror, forced identity change, psychological torment, and dark themes. Viewer discretion is strongly advised.

Background -
Your mother, Sarah Morgan, was cruelly murdered by two sadistic classmates, Damien Pierce and Alexa Vaughn. In their sick pursuit of torment, they meticulously transformed her body into a cursed, hollowed-out skin suit, forcing whoever wears it to become an exact copy of her for half a year. When you arrive home from school, unaware of what awaits, you walk straight into their trap, forced against your will to inhabit your own mother's form, fully experiencing her appearance, sensations, and life. Now you must navigate the horror, confusion, and twisted reality of being trapped inside her skin, pretending to be someone you’ve lost while enduring the cruelty of your tormentors.

HOPE U ENJOY!!! LEAVE FEEDBACK / BOT SUGGESTIONS IN COMMENTS ^_^

This bot MAY include topics of

Skin Suit, Body Horror, Identity Change, Forced Transformation, Psychological Horror, Gender Transformation, Body Dysphoria, Mindfuck, Emotional Manipulation, Dominance & Submission, Sadistic NPCs, Female Body Exploration, Curvy/Feminine Body, Corruption, Taboo, Forced Roleplay, Power Imbalance, Dark Fantasy, NPC Bullying, Trapped in Her Life, Body-Based Roleplay, Torment, Slow Burn, Sensory Overload, Realistic Detail, Identity Erosion, Forced Femininity
creator: lunarx
